body:
## What & why

Adds the six private-launch close-out artifacts that did not yet exist, wired to the
existing (already-mature) repo conventions instead of duplicating them. The repo already
has the gates, health endpoints, and launch docs — this fills the named gaps and keeps a
single source of truth.

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `scripts/dealix_close_now.sh` | Read-only verification runner: `make doctor / env-check / security-smoke / api-contract-check / test / prod-verify` + local/prod `/health` + `/health/deep` smoke. Opt-in web/docker build via `DEALIX_CLOSE_FULL=1`. Prints one private-launch verdict. **No live send, no live charge, no secret printing.** Complements (does not duplicate) `scripts/official_launch_verify.sh`. |
| `docs/ops/OFFICIAL_PRIVATE_LAUNCH_DECISION.md` | Bilingual decision record. **Private Launch = conditional GO; Public Launch = NO-GO** until first paid proof (gate G5). Records the **live** state of #638 / #650 (both open drafts on `main@7bd43c3`) and lists founder-only steps as a checklist. |
| `sales/COMMAND_SPRINT_OFFER.md` | Bilingual offer, **reconciled with `docs/OFFER_LADDER_AND_PRICING.md`**. |
| `sales/FIRST_50_TARGET_ACCOUNTS.csv` | PII-safe manual-research scaffold (20 seed rows, empty `company_name`, role-only). No scraping. |
| `sales/DEMO_SCRIPT_AR.md` | Arabic demo script, approval-first framing. |
| `sales/PRIVATE_LAUNCH_OUTREACH_AR.md` | Draft-only warm-list outreach; founder approval before send. |

## Pricing reconciliation (important)

The original spec proposed "Command Sprint = 7,500–15,000 SAR one-time". That **collides
with the canonical ladder**, where the sprint is **499 SAR** (rung 1) and 7,500–15,000 SAR
is the **monthly** Executive Command Center (rung 4, after ≥3 pilots). The offer doc instead
frames Command Sprint as the **private-launch packaging of the existing ladder** (entry at
the 499 SAR Proof Sprint, documented path upward) and cross-references the canon doc — so no
contradictory price is introduced.

## Doctrine compliance

- Every customer-facing doc ends with the value disclaimer (`القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة / Estimated value is not Verified value`).
- Approval-first / draft-only outreach; no cold WhatsApp, no LinkedIn automation, no scraping, no guaranteed-outcome claims; no PII in the tracker.

## NOT done here (founder-only, by design)

Per the 11 non-negotiables and this branch's scope, this PR does **not** merge #638/#650,
add secrets, change branch protection, create environments, deploy to Railway, or send any
outreach. Those are recorded as a checklist in the decision doc.

## Verification

- `bash -n scripts/dealix_close_now.sh` → syntax OK; all 7 referenced Makefile targets exist.
- `sales/FIRST_50_TARGET_ACCOUNTS.csv` parses (20 rows × 11 cols, `company_name` empty).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01UnvgVh7jWMaRaEDkcVZdfN

---

commits.messageBody:
- scripts/dealix_close_now.sh: read-only verification runner (make gates + local/prod
  health smoke), opt-in web/docker build, single private-launch verdict. No live
  send, no live charge, no secret printing.
- docs/ops/OFFICIAL_PRIVATE_LAUNCH_DECISION.md: bilingual decision record. Private
  Launch = conditional GO; Public Launch = NO-GO until first paid proof (G5). Records
  live #638/#650 draft state; founder-only steps captured as a checklist.
- sales/COMMAND_SPRINT_OFFER.md: reconciled with the canonical ladder — entry at the
  499 SAR 7-Day Revenue Proof Sprint; 7,500-15,000 SAR is the MONTHLY Executive
  Command Center (rung 4), not a one-time price. Single source of truth preserved.
- sales/FIRST_50_TARGET_ACCOUNTS.csv: PII-safe manual-research scaffold (no scraping).
- sales/DEMO_SCRIPT_AR.md, sales/PRIVATE_LAUNCH_OUTREACH_AR.md: approval-first,
  draft-only outreach with the mandatory value-disclaimer footer.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01UnvgVh7jWMaRaEDkcVZdfN

title: ops(launch): private-launch close-out artifacts (decision, offer, outreach, tracker, verify script)
